'''pazama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyjammas|pyjammas]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyjammas|pyjammas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzæmæth|pæzæmæth]] || [[word:pæzæmæj|pæzæmæj]] || [[word:pæzæmæsh|pæzæmæsh]] || [[word:pæzæmæ|pæzæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazazamath|pazazamath]] || [[word:pazazamaj|pazazamaj]] || [[word:pazazamash|pazazamash]] || [[word:pazazama|pazazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazamath|pazamath]] || [[word:pazamaj|pazamaj]] || [[word:pazamash|pazamash]] || [[word:pazama|pazama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazafmath|pazafmath]] || [[word:pazafmaj|pazafmaj]] || [[word:pazafmash|pazafmash]] || [[word:pazafmaf|pazafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazamatha|pazamatha]] || [[word:pazamaja|pazamaja]] || [[word:pazamasha|pazamasha]] || [[word:pazamaka|pazamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazamath|pazamath]] || [[word:pazamaj|pazamaj]] || [[word:pazamash|pazamash]] || [[word:pazama|pazama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazamathal|pazamathal]] || [[word:pazamajal|pazamajal]] || [[word:pazamashal|pazamashal]] || [[word:pazamakal|pazamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazamathatha|pazamathatha]] || [[word:pazamajaja|pazamajaja]] || [[word:pazamashasha|pazamashasha]] || [[word:pazamaka|pazamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazamathan|pazamathan]] || [[word:pazamajan|pazamajan]] || [[word:pazamashan|pazamashan]] || [[word:pazamakan|pazamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazamathaoro|pazamathaoro]] || [[word:pazamajaoro|pazamajaoro]] || [[word:pazamashaoro|pazamashaoro]] || [[word:pazamakaoro|pazamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
